title: Aurora 8-inch Flopsie Elephant , Grey
features: From Aurora’s highly popular Mini Flopsies Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
Realistic animal with soft and cuddly bean bag bodies.
Children will love this cute and hugely collectible animal.
description: Product Description Aurora World’s highly popular Mini Flopsies range brings you an extremely cute and cuddly Elephant. Made using the finest plush materials, this grey Elephant has a floppy bean bag body and is perfect as a gift. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Safety Warning Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources
